W f t * l f ^ (^rft^ ^ fa#^) tW?, 2006 ^ " 39. fef% 3tiftfr8K ^ ^ m TTP^ff ^T "faf^m Pduju) : T ^ i W ^K3 "^ T M ^ ^TH W T , WJ II, W5" 3 •Sq-^S (i) U Tn.^T.ft. 533(3T) TTTfra 5 %<^R, 2006 3 y<wH(W t^prr T ^ $ | 2798 GI/2008 MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the- 23rd July, 2008 G.S.R. 552(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (2) of Section 3SA read with clause (a) of sub-section (2) of Section 9 of the Company Secretaries Act, 1980 (56 of 1980), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Company Secretaries (Election to the Council) Rules, 2006, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Company S?crpt;irif"> CF.Ifrlinn to 'V* Cnimr.il) Amendment RII1P«; 2008. (2) These shall come Into force with effect from Ihe date of their publication in the Official Gazelle. 2. In Company Secretaries (Election to the Council) Rules, 2006, for rule 39, the following shall be substituted, namely— "39. Returning Officer to decide on certain matters - If any question pertaining lo or incidental to the procedure for conduct of elections including matters not specifically covered by these rules, arises, it shal I be decided by the Returning Officer or the officer authorised by him under these rules. Explanation.—For the purpose of this rule, the conduct of election shall also include the process of counting of votes and declaration of results". [F.No.9/7/2007-IGC] JITESH KHOSLA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 11, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide No. G.S.R. 533(E) dated the 5th September, 2006.
